notes.text: You can now enable the save and back feature to allow users to save an object page and navigate back to the list report page
We’ve resolved an issue where the analytical list page flickered when users switched between views
We've resolved an issue where the Save and Next buttons didn't work on object pages in edit mode
The context menu navigation is no longer disabled on list report pages configured with a creationEntitySet setting in the manifest.json file
We've resolved an issue where data was not correctly restored on nested object pages when navigating back using the browser back button
We've resolved an issue where export to PDF failed because 1:n navigation properties were incorrectly included in the OData request URL
We’ve improved the loading speed of the list report page when a record is edited directly from an object page
We've resolved an issue where clicking Edit after a failed save on an object page repeatedly triggered the same error
We've resolved an issue where cross-application navigation using a SmartLink passed empty semantic attribute values as filters after navigating back to a list report from an object page
